title: pseudo-fumaria intermedia
intro: Pseudo-fumaria intermedia, also known as False Fumitory, is a plant species belonging to the family Papaveraceae, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pseudo-fumaria intermedia include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory problems, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Herbal preparations of Pseudo-fumaria intermedia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
